items.content_html: JishoToAnki is a tool that translates lists of Japanese words from text files using the Jisho API. It formats the translations, including definitions and readings, for easy import into Anki, making it a powerful resource for efficiently studying and memorizing Japanese vocabulary.
items.title: Puffy12/JishoToAnki: JishoToAnki is a tool that translates lists of Japanese words from text files using the Jisho API. It formats the translations, including definitions and readings, for easy import into Anki, making it a powerful resource for efficiently studying and memorizing Japanese vocabulary.

items.content_html: This repository contains simple JavaScript, HTML and CSS code for front and back cards, designed specifically for styling multiple choice questions in Anki. All credits go to Ashraf Nabil for the original code; I've adapted it to support RTL (right-to-left) languages like Persian, Arabic and Hebrew.
items.title: muctebanesiri/anki-multiple-choise-question-template: This repository contains simple JavaScript, HTML and CSS code for front and back cards, designed specifically for styling multiple choice questions in Anki. All credits go to Ashraf Nabil for the original code; I've adapted it to support RTL (right-to-left) languages like Persian, Arabic and Hebrew.
